Created attachment 189418
databases/sqldeveloper: update to 17.4.0.355.2349

Update databases/sqldeveloper from 4.2.0.17.089.1709 to 17.4.0.355.2349

Release notes:
http://www.oracle.com/technetwork/developer-tools/sql-developer/downloads/sqldev-relnotes-173-3939064.html

Important changes:

- LICENSE_NAME set to OTN (Oracle technology network)
- Add support to freedesktop with proper desktop and icon files.


Regards
